Hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer building autonomous tools for SMBs.
Hero.subline: French. Currently in Bangkok. Available for contracts.

Bio.title: About
Bio.paragraph: French engineer based in Bangkok. I build AI-driven automation for SMBs that lose hours on email, customer ops, and admin. Currently shipping Velora — a CRM that runs itself. Background in Next.js, FastAPI, AWS, and applied LLMs (Claude, Gemini, GPT-4o).

Stack.title: Stack & Skills
Stack.specialty: I specialize in shipping production LLM agents — cron-driven, human-in-the-loop, multilingual.

velora.name: Velora
velora.subtitle: AI-native CRM for B2B operators
velora.problem: SMBs lose hours daily replying to suppliers, customers, and reviews. Existing CRMs need a human in the loop for every step.
velora.solution: A self-driving CRM that ingests inbox + web reviews + supplier comms, drafts responses with LLMs, escalates only when needed.

autoPush.name: auto_push
autoPush.subtitle: AI-powered git commit CLI
autoPush.problem: Writing meaningful commit messages slows down flow.
autoPush.solution: Rust CLI installed globally. Run auto_push anywhere: it stages changes, sends the diff to Claude API, generates a commit message, then commits and pushes.

devCalendar.name: dev_calendar
devCalendar.subtitle: Personal coding & listening dashboard
devCalendar.problem: No good way to visualize coding habits alongside other daily signals.
devCalendar.solution: Calendar view connecting GitHub + Spotify. Each day shows commit count and listening time. Click a day to see tracks and commits grouped by repo.

piSpotify.name: pi_spotify_manager
piSpotify.subtitle: Tactile Spotify controller for Raspberry Pi
piSpotify.problem: Wanted a dedicated physical mini-display for music control.
piSpotify.solution: Raspberry Pi + touchscreen. Displays current track cover. Tap to play/pause, double-tap sides for prev/next. Desktop version also available.

step1.title: Discovery call
step1.description: Understand your current process and identify where hours are bleeding.

step3.title: Build MVP
step3.description: Weekly demos, shared Linear/Notion, full transparency.

Testimonials.title: What clients say
Testimonials.quote: Mateo shipped our CRM automation in 5 weeks. We went from drowning in supplier emails to having drafts ready every morning. Best ROI we've had on a tech contract.
Testimonials.author: CEO, B2B distributor (Bangkok)

Contact.headline: Got a process bleeding hours? Let's automate it.

Footer.builtWith: Built with Claude Code · Shipped from Bangkok
